sentences.target: On a un robot aspirateur maintenant.

translations.fr: On a un robot aspirateur maintenant.
translations.en: We have a robot vacuum now.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们现在有一台扫地机器人。
translations.yue: 我哋而家有部掃地機械人。
translations.he: יש לנו עכשיו שואב אבק רובוטי.
translations.vi: Bây giờ nhà mình có robot hút bụi.
translations.hi: अब हमारे पास रोबोट वैक्यूम है.
translations.id: Sekarang kami punya robot penyedot debu.
translations.ja: 今はロボット掃除機があります。

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun meaning ‘we/one’; controls 3rd person singular agreement on the verb.
Finite main verb (3rd person singular, present) expressing possession; agrees with ‘On’.
Indefinite article (masculine singular) introducing the direct object NP.
Noun, head of the direct object; first element in the N+N compound ‘robot aspirateur’.
Noun modifying ‘robot’ in a compound (‘robot aspirateur’ = robot vacuum cleaner).
Temporal adverb specifying when the state holds.

sentences.target: Le robot ne passe pas sous le canapé.
sentences.reading: /lə ʁo.bo nə pas pɑ su lə ka.na.pe/

translations.fr: Le robot ne passe pas sous le canapé.
translations.ipa: /lə ʁo.bo nə pas pɑ su lə ka.na.pe/
translations.en: The robot doesn't go under the couch.
translations.es: El robot no pasa por debajo del sofá.
translations.de: Der Saugroboter kommt nicht unter das Sofa.
translations.it: Il robot non passa sotto il divano.
translations.zh-Hans: 扫地机器人进不去沙发底下。
translations.yue: 掃地機械人入唔到梳化底。
translations.pt: O robô não passa embaixo do sofá.
translations.vi: Robot không vào được dưới gầm ghế sofa.
translations.nl: De robot gaat niet onder de bank.
translations.hu: A robot nem megy be a kanapé alá.
translations.hi: रोबोट सोफ़े के नीचे नहीं जाता.
translations.el: Το ρομπότ δεν πάει κάτω από τον καναπέ.
translations.id: Robot tidak masuk ke bawah sofa.
translations.sv: Roboten går inte in under soffan.
translations.da: Robotten kører ikke ind under sofaen.
translations.ja: ロボット掃除機はソファの下に入らない。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (masculine singular) introducing the subject NP.
Noun, head of the subject NP.
First element of the discontinuous negation ‘ne … pas’ surrounding the finite verb.
Finite verb (3rd person singular, present); takes the prepositional complement ‘sous le canapé’.
Negative adverb; second element of the negation completing ‘ne … pas’.
Preposition introducing a locative prepositional phrase.
Definite article within the prepositional phrase.
Noun, object of the preposition ‘sous’.

sentences.target: Je sors le robot de cuisine ce soir.
sentences.reading: /ʒə sɔʁ lə ʁo.bo də kɥi.zin sə swaʁ/

translations.fr: Je sors le robot de cuisine ce soir.
translations.ipa: /ʒə sɔʁ lə ʁo.bo də kɥi.zin sə swaʁ/
translations.en: I'm taking out the food processor tonight.
translations.es: Esta noche saco el procesador de alimentos.
translations.de: Heute Abend hole ich die Küchenmaschine heraus.
translations.it: Stasera tiro fuori il robot da cucina.
translations.ko: 오늘 밤에 푸드 프로세서를 꺼낼 거예요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我今晚把料理机拿出来。
translations.yue: 我今晚會攞出食物處理器。
translations.ru: Сегодня вечером я достану кухонный комбайн.
translations.pt: Hoje à noite vou tirar o processador de alimentos.
translations.he: הערב אני מוציא את מעבד המזון.
translations.vi: Tối nay tôi sẽ lấy máy xay thực phẩm ra.
translations.nl: Vanavond haal ik de keukenmachine tevoorschijn.
translations.uk: Сьогодні ввечері я дістану кухонний комбайн.
translations.hu: Ma este előveszem a konyhai robotgépet.
translations.hi: आज रात मैं फूड प्रोसेसर निकालूँगा.
translations.nb: I kveld tar jeg fram kjøkkenmaskinen.
translations.id: Malam ini aku akan mengeluarkan pengolah makanan.
translations.sv: I kväll tar jag fram matberedaren.
translations.ro: În seara asta scot robotul de bucătărie.
translations.da: I aften tager jeg foodprocessoren frem.
translations.ja: 今夜はフードプロセッサーを取り出します。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun.
Finite verb (1st person singular, present); transitive here meaning ‘to take out’.
Definite article introducing the direct object NP.
Direct object of ‘sors’; head of the NP ‘le robot de cuisine’.
Preposition introducing the nominal complement ‘cuisine’ that specifies the type of robot.
Noun complement of ‘de’, forming ‘robot de cuisine’ (kitchen robot/food processor).
Demonstrative determiner modifying the temporal noun ‘soir’.
Temporal noun; with ‘ce’ forms an adverbial time expression modifying the verb phrase.

sentences.target: Les enfants regardent le robot avec curiosité.
sentences.reading: /lez ɑ̃.fɑ̃ ʁə.ɡaʁd lə ʁo.bo a.vɛk ky.ʁjo.zi.te/

translations.fr: Les enfants regardent le robot avec curiosité.
translations.ipa: /lez ɑ̃.fɑ̃ ʁə.ɡaʁd lə ʁo.bo a.vɛk ky.ʁjo.zi.te/
translations.en: The kids watch the robot with curiosity.
translations.es: Los niños miran al robot con curiosidad.
translations.de: Die Kinder schauen den Roboter neugierig an.
translations.it: I bambini guardano il robot con curiosità.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们好奇地看着机器人。
translations.yue: 小朋友好奇咁望住個機械人。
translations.ru: Дети с любопытством смотрят на робота.
translations.pt: As crianças observam o robô com curiosidade.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ nhìn robot với vẻ tò mò.
translations.nl: De kinderen kijken nieuwsgierig naar de robot.
translations.uk: Діти з цікавістю дивляться на робота.
translations.hu: A gyerekek kíváncsan nézik a robotot.
translations.hi: बच्चे रोबोट को जिज्ञासा से देखते हैं.
translations.pl: Dzieci z ciekawością patrzą na robota.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά κοιτάζουν το ρομπότ με περιέργεια.
translations.id: Anak-anak melihat robot dengan rasa ingin tahu.
translations.ja: 子どもたちは好奇心いっぱいでロボットを見ている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article (plural) introducing the subject NP.
Plural noun; head of the subject NP.
Finite verb (3rd person plural, present); takes a direct object and a manner PP.
Definite article introducing the direct object NP.
Direct object of ‘regardent’.
Preposition introducing a manner phrase.
Noun, object of the preposition ‘avec’; expresses manner.
